features: Large Size: This set of jumbo glitter pots makes arts and crafts easy. Use for all of your crafting needs with just a shake of the container. Use with glue for a secure hold.
Shiny and Vibrant Glitter: Each shaker contains 100g of coloured glitter flakes, which can be sprinkled or poured, as needed.
Traditional Colours: Ideal for a variety of projects, this pack contains two colours, including gold and silver. Mix and match for a truly custom sparkly work of art.
Creative Ideas: Unisex crafts are perfect for girls and boys. Use for birthday party crafts, card making, 3D art, posters, prizes, crafting, embellishments, and more.

Safety First: All Baker Ross toys and crafts satisfy stringent European Community Safety Laws, and carry the CE mark. Baker Ross caters to a variety of ages and leaves it to customers to assess whether a child is old enough for any particular item.
description: Product Description Add glittery effects! Each pack contains 2 assorted colours per pack - Gold & Silver. 100g per shaker. Shaker size 8cm high (3.1 inch). Use with our PVA glue (not included). Safety Warning WARNING! Not suitable for children under 36 months - small parts. Choking hazard. Retain address.
